title: Add an E&A activity at specific time, not for multiplies of 15 min
excerpt:
I want to use the E&A app to schedule phone calls in the future.  At the moment it is only possible to add them for 15 min intervals.  If synced to your calendar this then blocks out 15mins in your diary. 
Could this be …

posts.author: NGriff (Neal Griffin)
posts.cookedHtml:
I want to use the E&A app to schedule phone calls in the future. At the moment it is only possible to add them for 15 min intervals. If synced to your calendar this then blocks out 15mins in your diary.

Could this be allowed to set a time for the call at say 10am only.
